title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 281.230 - Rules and regulations, authority
text:
281.230.  Rules and regulations, authority. — The director shall administer and enforce the provisions of sections 281.210 to 281.310 and shall have authority to promulgate rules in accordance with the provisions of chapter 536 to carry out the provisions of sections 281.210 to 281.310.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1514 § 263.290, A.L. 1993 S.B. 52)
